rows.definition: Physical tensor span removal and RoPE re-rotation in KV cache for memory compaction
rows.distinction: Physical tensor compaction in the attention cache - NOT playbook pruning (logical span removal)

rows.definition: Logical span pruning from rendered playbook under token budget
rows.distinction: Logical pruning under token budget returning evicted bullets - NOT KV cache eviction (tensor compaction)

rows.definition: Model instance eviction from a bounded LRU session pool
rows.distinction: LRU session pool eviction to stay within budget - NOT playbook pruning (removes context spans)
